name: /doctor --explain reports the resolved severity and options block when the rule is configured as the two-element array error with options
command:
mkdir -p profiles && printf 'rules:
  no-eval:
    - error
    - {allowGlobal: true}
' > profiles/p.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/doctor.sh" --explain no-eval --profile profiles/p.yaml 2>out.txt && grep -q 'effective_severity=error' out.txt && grep -q 'options.allowGlobal=true' out.txt && echo ok 1>&2
